name: Appealing Denied Utah Workers' Comp Claims

mainEntity.name: Steps to appeal a denied workers' comp claim in Utah Labor Commission?
mainEntity.text: Steps to appeal a denied workers' comp claim in Utah Labor Commission?

acceptedAnswer.text: Request formal hearing within 20 days of denial; submit evidence; hearing before ALJ, then appeal to Commission.

suggestedAnswer.text: Gather medical records, witness statements. Deadlines strict—missed appeals fatal. Insurers deny 20% claims; appeals win 60%. Essential for Bountiful/North Salt Lake denials.

description: Request formal hearing within 20 days of denial; submit evidence; hearing before ALJ, then appeal to Commission.
